title: iridorkis heliophylla
intro: Iridorkis heliophylla, also known as the Orange Wild Ginger or Ginger Lily, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It is a medicinal plant with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Iridorkis heliophylla include its ability to alleviate nausea, reduce pain and inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as dried roots and rhizomes that can be used in traditional medicine.
